title: DatasetManifest
description: Manifest describing a dataset partition (dev, calibration, or sealed).

case_count.description: Number of cases in the partition.

questions_sha256.description: SHA256 of the canonical questions JSONL content. Placeholder until computed by scripts.

labels_sha256.description: SHA256 of the canonical labels JSONL content. Null for the sealed public manifest.

slices.description: Slice tags covered by this partition.
